steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Expand and rearrange into standard form: $x^2 - 15x - 34 = 0$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
Factor: find two numbers that multiply to $-34$ and add to $-15$ — those are $-17$ and $2$.
$(x - 17)(x + 2) = 0 \ \Rightarrow \ x = 17$ or $x = -2$
The positive solution is $x = 17$.
